name: 05-30-stage2-rvv-segment2-route-family-owner-completion
title: Stage2 RVV segment2 route-family owner completion
description: Externalize segment2 route-family operand binding and provider-plan ownership from RVVEmitCRoutePlanning.cpp into RVVEmitCSegment2RouteFamilyPlanOwners, keeping central segment2 dispatch neutral and requiring representative plain/computed-mask segment2 cases to derive plan facts through the owner module with fail-closed unsupported/mismatch coverage.
creator: codex
